description: Improved Gemma full embedding classifier. Extends the setup104-style stack to Gemma with [response_emb | gemma4_e4b_emb | delta_gemma], recenters the Gemma delta by the mean negative-class residual, appends abs(delta), cosine(response, gemma), and ||delta||, and selects the logistic-regression C/class-weight combination on validation Macro F1. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning. Trainer type: embedding_classifier.
